summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TILAWA v3 Quran reading app. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend core functionality working well with minor UI overlay issue in chat.

ui_bugs.issue: Send button click intercepted by 'Made with Emergent' overlay badge
ui_bugs.workaround: Chat functionality works, just overlay positioning issue

passed_tests: Mushaf screen navigation and dark theme working
Arabic text and Bismillah display correctly in gold color
Tajweed legend bar visible with 5 rules
Library page shows Mukashafatul Quloob content (547+ chunks)
AI Chat FAB opens chat panel successfully
Research mode toggle works and shows RAG sources
All backend APIs (health, mushaf, library, chat, translations, reciters)
Local Quran data (6236 verses) loaded correctly
TILAWA design tokens and dark theme
PDF content ingestion and RAG search working
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor UI overlay issue where 'Made with Emergent' badge intercepts chat send button clicks. Consider adjusting z-index or positioning of the badge.
